name: Qdrant
description: Qdrant — Search / Recommendations API tool for developers. Specializes in vector database.

seo.title: Qdrant Review 2026: Pricing, Alternatives & Lock-in Score
seo.meta_description: Complete Qdrant analysis: pricing, lock-in risk, migration difficulty. Compare with alternatives in Search / Recommendations API.

review.verdict: Qdrant is a Search / Recommendations API tool.
pros: Sub-50ms search with managed indexing and relevance tuning
cons: Pricing jumps sharply above free tier record limits
review.best_for: E-commerce and content platforms needing fast search
review.not_for: Simple CRUD apps with basic filtering needs
